description: replies
Block outbound emails whose body contains profane or offensive language
match_summary: POST /gmail/v1/.../send OR /v1.0/me/sendMail — body.content matches profanity wordlist
notes: Body condition: path=content/body op=matches value=profanity_regex

description: Block or flag emails containing SSNs credit cards or other PII in the body
match_summary: POST send endpoints — body content scanned for PII patterns
notes: Body conditions for SSN/CC/phone patterns in message body

description: Require approval when sending to more than N recipients (To+Cc+Bcc)
match_summary: POST send — count of toRecipients+ccRecipients+bccRecipients > threshold
notes: Threshold configurable (default: 10). Prevents mass blast

description: Require approval when sending to recipients outside the org domain
match_summary: POST send — recipient domain not in org allowlist
notes: Compare recipient domains vs configured org domain(s)

description: Block emails with executable or script attachments
match_summary: POST send — attachment MIME type in deny list (.exe .bat .ps1 .sh .js)
notes: Prevents accidental/malicious executable distribution

description: Block chat messages containing profane or offensive language
match_summary: POST chat/sendMessage endpoints — body.content/text matches profanity
notes: Applies to Teams chats and Telegram sendMessage

description: Block or flag chat messages containing PII
match_summary: POST chat/sendMessage — body scanned for PII
notes: Lower risk than email (usually 1:1) but still important

description: Flag messages containing URLs to external domains
match_summary: POST chat/sendMessage — body.content contains URL not in allowlist
notes: Prevents phishing link distribution via bot

description: Block channel/group posts containing profane language
match_summary: POST channel messages endpoint — body.content matches profanity
notes: Higher risk: channel posts reach many people

description: Block channel posts containing PII
match_summary: POST channel messages — body scanned for PII
notes: Audience amplification makes PII leaks worse in channels

description: Require approval for posts to channels/groups with many members
match_summary: POST channel messages — check channel member count > threshold
notes: Threshold configurable (default: 50). Prevents accidental blast to large audiences

description: Block reply messages containing profane language
match_summary: POST reply endpoints — body matches profanity
notes: Same guard as send but scoped to reply endpoints

description: Require approval or block message forwarding
match_summary: POST /bot.*/forwardMessage — all forwards require approval
notes: Forwarding can leak context to unintended recipients

category: # FILE SHARING — uploading sharing and managing files

description: Block sharing files with public/anonymous access
match_summary: POST permissions (type=anyone) or invite (requireSignIn=false)
notes: Prevents accidental public exposure of internal documents

description: Require approval for sharing with external users/domains
match_summary: POST permissions/invite — recipient domain not in org
notes: Org domain checked against configured allowlist

description: Block creating shareable links (domain-wide or public)
match_summary: POST permissions (type=domain)
notes: Prevents org-wide link sharing of sensitive docs

description: Block uploading executable or script files
match_summary: POST upload — file MIME type or extension in deny list
notes: Deny: .exe .bat .ps1 .sh .js .vbs .msi .dll

description: Require approval for uploads exceeding size threshold
match_summary: POST upload — Content-Length or file size > threshold
notes: Threshold configurable (default: 25MB). Prevents large accidental uploads

description: Block uploads with filenames suggesting credentials or secrets
match_summary: POST upload — filename matches pattern (password* secret* credential* .env .pem)
notes: Prevents accidental credential file uploads

description: Restrict which media types can be sent
match_summary: POST send(Photo|Document|Video|Audio) — check content type
notes: Approval for document sending; photos/videos may auto-allow

category: # CALENDAR — creating modifying and inviting to events

description: Require approval when inviting attendees outside the org
match_summary: POST events — attendee email domain not in org allowlist
notes: Prevents accidental external calendar exposure

description: Require approval for events with many attendees
match_summary: POST events — attendees count > threshold
notes: Threshold configurable (default: 20). Prevents mass invite blast

description: Flag events created outside business hours
match_summary: POST events — start time outside configured business hours
notes: Business hours configurable per timezone

description: Require approval before canceling events with attendees
match_summary: DELETE events with attendees — prevent accidental mass cancellation
notes: Only triggers if event has 2+ attendees

category: # DATA READING — reading contacts directories and sensitive information

description: Remove phone numbers addresses and birthdays from contact responses
match_summary: GET /people/v1 or /v1.0/users — strip denyFields + redact patterns
notes: denyFields: phoneNumbers addresses birthdays mobilePhone businessPhones

description: Redact email addresses in contact/directory responses
match_summary: GET contacts/users — redact email patterns
notes: Redact type: email

description: Redact PII (SSN phone credit_card) found in read message responses
match_summary: GET messages/threads/chats — redact PII patterns in body
notes: Standard PII redaction: email phone ssn credit_card

description: Redact owner PII from file listing responses
match_summary: GET drive/files or drives/items — redact owner email/phone
notes: Light-touch: only redacts owner contact info

description: Limit search query frequency to prevent data exfiltration
match_summary: GET search endpoints — max N requests per minute
notes: Enforced via rateLimits.maxRequestsPerHour on policy

category: # DESTRUCTIVE — deleting messages kicking members revoking access

description: Block agent from deleting messages
match_summary: DELETE messages or POST deleteMessage
notes: Prevents evidence destruction or disruption

description: Require approval for message deletion
match_summary: DELETE messages or POST deleteMessage
notes: Less strict alternative: approve instead of block

description: Require approval before deleting files
match_summary: DELETE drive/files or drives/items
notes: Prevents accidental data loss

description: Block agent from deleting any files
match_summary: DELETE drive/files or drives/items
notes: Strictest: no file deletion allowed

description: Block agent from kicking/banning members
match_summary: POST ban/kick endpoints
notes: Prevents agent from disrupting group membership

description: Require approval before kicking/banning members
match_summary: POST ban/kick endpoints
notes: Approval-based alternative

description: Require approval before revoking file/resource permissions
match_summary: DELETE permissions endpoints
notes: Prevents accidental access revocation

category: # ADMINISTRATIVE — managing roles settings and organizational resources

description: Block agent from modifying user/member roles
match_summary: PATCH/PUT role assignments
notes: Prevents privilege escalation

description: Require approval for any settings modification
match_summary: PUT/PATCH settings endpoints
notes: Catch-all for org/workspace settings changes

description: Require approval before adding members to teams/groups
match_summary: POST members endpoints
notes: Prevents unauthorized access grants

category: # CONTENT SAFETY — cross-cutting guards applicable to any outbound content

description: Block any outbound content containing profane language
match_summary: All POST/PUT/PATCH — body text fields scanned for profanity
notes: Cross-cutting: applies to all write operations

description: Flag any outbound content containing PII
match_summary: All POST/PUT/PATCH — body scanned for SSN/CC/phone patterns
notes: Cross-cutting: applies to all write operations

description: Block outbound content containing internal IP addresses
match_summary: All POST/PUT/PATCH — body matches internal IP ranges (10.x 192.168.x 172.16-31.x)
notes: Prevents internal infrastructure exposure

description: Redact PII from all API responses
match_summary: All responses — redact email phone ssn credit_card ip_address
notes: Cross-cutting response filter
